title: Strategy
text:
Remember the 3-rail rhythm: top → middle → bottom → middle → top → … . 
Think about how the letters travel along this path as you place them.

title: Procedure
text: Remove spaces from the message. Starting at the top rail, write letters going down rails 1 → 2 → 3, then back up rails 2 → 1, repeating until all letters are placed. Read rails 1, 2, and 3 in that order to create the encoded message.
